title: Compose shapes
description: Practice combining shapes to make other shapes.

assessment_items.question_content:
**Use these rectangles:**  

![A blue rectangle and a yellow rectangle.](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/9c94e1b9841d998d3dde66458ed185d7.png)  

**to make a square.**  

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints:
The rectangles can make this square:  

![A square with the left side blue and the right side yellow.](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/62ec7061941573223f81ae0c276eddfc.png)

choices.content: ![A rectangle with the left half blue and the right half yellow.](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/12344e00dacfb1a94a6b96c86531a4da.png)
![A square with the left side blue and the right side yellow.](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/62ec7061941573223f81ae0c276eddfc.png)
![A square divided diagonally with the bottom left yellow and the top right blue.](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/0bce96a22cf1c3a14a9e28d47000b965.png)

assessment_items.question_content:
**Use these small rectangles:**  

![A blue rectangle and a red rectangle are equal in size.](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/f296b7d3f6f328e900f4bcd13745c04f.png)  

**to make a big rectangle.**  

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints:
The small rectangles can make this big rectangle:  

![The blue and red rectangles are placed vertical and lined up next to each other.](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/e34db11c14484a0039eec27b195713cd.png)

choices.content: ![A red rectangle placed vertical with a blue rectangle placed horizontal. The bottom of the blue rectangle is even with the bottom right side of the red rectangle.](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/63c6e72e1afe84a61578cf16af5250b9.png)

![A red rectangle placed horizontal with a blue horizontal rectangle placed below it. The top left of the blue rectangle is even with the bottom middle of the red rectangle.](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/caae271e680821e64d756bbbced47ba7.png)
![The blue and red rectangles are placed vertical and lined up next to each other.](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/e34db11c14484a0039eec27b195713cd.png)

choices.content: ![The gray square and the purple square are touching each other. The top left side of the purple square touches the bottom right side of the gray square.](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/fbd2711ae7eb448367fad755d22ad888.png)
